english: Agility both increases the rate at which your Run Energy replenishes while not running and decreases the rate at which it drains while you run.
translation: 敏捷既能提高你在非奔跑状态下跑步值的恢复速度，也能降低你在奔跑时跑步值的消耗速度。

english: You will also gain access to useful shortcuts across Gielinor; these are marked with a green arrow on your map.
translation: 你还将获得穿越基利诺尔的捷径权限，这些捷径在你的地图上以绿色箭头标记。

english: In order to train your Agility skill, you will need an Agility course; these are a series of obstacles that reward experience upon completion.
translation: 为了训练你的敏捷技能，你需要前往敏捷训练场。训练场有一系列的障碍，在完成后会给予经验值奖励。

english: You can now use the Falador Agility shortcut and the Shayzien basic course.
translation: 你现在可以使用法拉多城的捷径和谢兹恩基础敏捷训练场。

english: Members can cross the River Lum to Al Kharid and back by using a mithril grapple.
translation: 会员可以使用秘银抓钩穿越仑河往返阿尔卡里德城。

english: You can now cross the rope swing to Moss Giant Island and use the Corsair Cove shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用绳索秋千前往苔藓巨人岛，以及使用海盗湾的捷径。

english: Members can scale Falador south wall with a mithril grapple.
translation: 会员可以使用秘银抓钩攀爬法拉多城南墙。

english: You can now use the stepping stones in Karamja Dungeon.
translation: 你现在可以使用卡拉姆詹地牢中的踏脚石捷径。

english: You can now jump the fence south of Varrock.
translation: 你现在可以跳过维洛克城南部的栅栏。

english: You can now use the monkey bars under Edgeville and the Corsair Cove Dungeon shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用边陲镇下方的攀爬架和海盗湾地牢的捷径。

english: You can now use the Yanille Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用亚尼勒城的捷径。

english: You can now use a Kourend Catacombs Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用库兰德王国地下墓穴的捷径。

english: You can now use the Al Kharid course, pass medium level Agility Arena obstacles and cross the coal truck log balance agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用阿尔卡里德敏捷训练场，和通过敏捷竞技场的中级难度障碍，以及穿越煤车的独木桥捷径。

english: You can now use the Grand Exchange Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用大交易所的捷径。

english: You can now use the pipe contortion in Karamja Dungeon.
translation: 你现在可以使用卡拉姆詹地牢中的管道捷径。

english: Members can scale the Observatory cliff with a mithril grapple.
translation: 会员可以使用秘银抓钩攀爬天文台悬崖。

english: You can now enter the Werewolf Skullball Course and use the cliffside scramble shortcut to get up Eagles' Peak.
translation: 你现在可以进入狼人骷髅球敏捷训练场，以及使用悬崖攀爬捷径登上鹰峰。

english: You can now use the Falador Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用法拉多城的捷径。

english: You can now use the Kourend Catacombs pillar jump Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用库兰德王国地下墓穴的石柱跳跃捷径。

english: You can now use the lower cliffside climb by Mount Karuulm.
translation: 你现在可以使用卡鲁尔姆山下层的悬崖攀爬捷径。

english: You can now use the Agility Pyramid, the Varrock course, the Stepping stones in south eastern Karamja and the Corsair Cove Resource Area shortcut. You can also use the Penguin Agility Course if you have begun
translation: 你现在可以使用敏捷金字塔、维洛克敏捷训练场、卡拉姆詹东南部的踏脚石捷径和海盗湾资源区的捷径。如果你已开始冷战任务，你还可以使用企鹅敏捷训练场。

english: You can now use the Draynor Manor stones to Champions' guild Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用德雷诺庄园往返冠军公会的踏脚石捷径。

english: Members can now use the Shilo Village river crossing.
translation: 会员现在可以使用希洛村河流渡口。

english: You can now use the Ardougne log balance Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用阿多尼城的独木桥捷径。

english: You can now use the pipe contortion in Karamja Dungeon and a Kourend Catacombs Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用卡拉姆詹地牢中的管道捷径和库兰德王国地下墓穴的捷径。

english: You can now enter the Barbarian Agility Course and the Varrock Palace Garden Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以进入野蛮人敏捷训练场和维洛克皇宫花园的捷径。

english: You can now use the Gnome Stronghold Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用地精要塞的捷径。

english: You can now use Al Kharid mining pit cliffside scramble Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用阿尔卡里德城矿坑的悬崖攀爬捷径。

english: Members can scale Yanille south wall by using a mithril grapple.
translation: 会员可以使用秘银抓钩攀爬亚尼勒城南墙。

english: You can now use the Canifis course, pass high level Agility Arena obstacles and use the Hosidius lake isle jump Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用坎尼非斯村敏捷训练场，和通过敏捷竞技场的高级难度障碍，以及使用霍西迪乌斯湖心岛的跳跃捷径。

english: You can now use Trollheim easy cliffside scramble Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用巨魔之乡的简单悬崖攀爬捷径。

english: You can now use Dwarven mine narrow crevice Agility shortcut and climb the wall at Draynor toward Port Sarim.
translation: 你现在可以使用矮人矿坑的窄缝捷径，并攀爬德雷诺村通往沙林港的墙壁。

english: You can now use Trollheim medium cliffside scramble Agility shortcut and the Fremennik Slayer Dungeon spiked blades jump Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用巨魔之乡的中级悬崖攀爬捷径和费明尼克杀戮者地牢的尖刺跳跃捷径。

english: You can now use Trollheim advanced cliffside scramble.
translation: 你现在可以使用巨魔之乡的高难悬崖攀爬捷径。

english: You can now use the Elf area log balance and the Hosidius river jump Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用精灵区域的独木桥捷径和霍西迪乌斯河的跳跃捷径。

english: You can now use the Cosmic Temple medium narrow walkway Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用宇宙神殿的中级窄路捷径。

english: You can now use Trollheim hard cliffside scramble.
translation: 你现在可以使用巨魔之乡的困难悬崖攀爬捷径。

english: You can now use the Ape Atoll Agility Course, the Shayzien advanced course and the log balance to Fremennik Province Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用猿猴岛敏捷训练场、谢兹恩高级敏捷训练场和通往费明尼克省的的独木桥捷径。

english: You can now equip Crystal Equipment, access the Falador course and cross the stepping stone near the Nature Grotto.
translation: 你现在可以装备水晶装备，进入法拉多敏捷训练场，并穿越自然洞穴附近的踏脚石捷径。

english: You can now use the pipe from Edgeville dungeon to Varrock sewers Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用从边陲镇地牢到维洛克城下水道的管道捷径。

english: You can now enter the Wilderness Agility Course, enter Floor 1 of the Hallowed Sepulchre and use the eastern scramble at the Arceuus essence mine.
translation: 你现在可以进入荒野敏捷训练场，进入神圣墓穴1层，以及使用阿西乌斯城精华矿东部的攀爬捷径。

english: Members can take a shortcut south of the volcano on the island of Karamja by using a mithril grapple.
translation: 会员可以使用秘银抓钩在卡拉姆詹岛火山南部走捷径。

english: You can now use the Motherlode Mine dark tunnel shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用母岩矿坑的黑暗隧道捷径。

english: You can now use the stepping stone by Miscellania docks.
translation: 你现在可以使用米斯凯尼亚国码头旁的踏脚石捷径。

english: You can now use the rock climb in the  Temple of the Eye.
translation: 你现在可以使用眼之神殿中的攀岩捷径。

english: You can now jump over the eastern Rellekka fence.
translation: 你现在可以跳过雷勒卡城东部的栅栏。

english: You can now use the Elven Overpass easy cliffside scramble Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用精灵天桥的简单悬崖攀爬捷径。

english: You can now use the Werewolf and Seers' Village courses, jump the pillars in the Wintertodt's prison, access the God Wars Dungeon via the Agility route, jump the estuary across Mos Le'Harmless and the
translation: 你现在可以使用狼人和先知村敏捷训练场，跳过寒冬监狱中的柱子，通过捷径进入神战地牢，跳过莫斯勒哈姆斯岛的河口。

english: You can now use the Slayer tower medium spiked chain climb Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用杀戮者之塔的中级带刺链条攀爬捷径。

english: You can now enter Floor 2 of the Hallowed Sepulchre, use the Slayer Dungeon narrow crevice shortcut, the stepping stones in the Necropolis and the upper cliffside climb by Mount Karuulm.
translation: 你现在可以进入神圣墓穴2层，使用杀戮者地牢的窄缝捷径、亡灵城的踏脚石捷径和卡鲁尔姆山上方的悬崖攀爬捷径。

english: You can now use the Taverley dungeon lesser demon fence Agility shortcut and the Darkmeyer wall shortcut and the Forthos dungeon shortcut
translation: 你现在可以使用塔韦利地牢的小恶魔栅栏捷径、达克迈尔的墙壁捷径和福索斯地牢的捷径

english: You can now use the Trollheim Wilderness Agility shortcut and the Rope to the Fossil Island Volcano.
translation: 你现在可以使用巨魔之乡荒野捷径和通往化石岛火山的绳索捷径。

english: You can now use the Temple on the Salve to Morytania and easy Revenant cave Agility shortcuts.
translation: 你现在可以使用萨鲁夫河上通往莫利塔尼亚的神殿捷径和简单亡灵洞穴的捷径。

english: You can now use the Cosmic Temple advanced narrow walkway Agility shortcut and jump the stepping stone from Lumbridge to the Desert, and the Taverley wall shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用宇宙神殿的高难窄路捷径，跳过从仑桥镇到沙漠的踏脚石捷径，以及塔韦利村墙壁捷径。

english: You can now access the Yanille dungeons using rubble climb.
translation: 你现在可以通过碎石攀爬捷径进入亚尼勒地牢。

english: You can now use the Elven Overpass medium cliffside scramble and the Ice Mountain western scramble Agility shortcuts.
translation: 你现在可以使用精灵天桥的中级悬崖攀爬捷径和冰山西部攀爬捷径。

english: You can now use the northern scramble at the Arceuus essence mine.
translation: 你现在可以使用阿西乌斯城精华矿北部的攀爬捷径。

english: You can now use the Dorgeshuun and Pollnivneach Courses, use the Taverley Dungeon dragon and Fossil Island hardwood shortcuts, access the Saradomin God Wars Dungeon area and equip Rings of Endurance
translation: 你现在可以使用多格舒恩和波尼尼敏捷训练场，使用塔韦利地牢巨龙和化石岛的硬木捷径，进入萨拉多明神战地牢区域，并装备耐力戒指。

english: You can now use the Slayer tower advanced spiked chain climb Agility shortcut and the Gu'Tanoth wall climb if you have completed the Watchtower quest.
translation: 如果你已完成瞭望塔任务，你现在可以使用杀戮者之塔的高难尖刺链攀爬捷径和古塔诺斯的墙壁攀爬捷径。

english: You can now enter Floor 3 of the Hallowed Sepulchre, and use the Stronghold Slayer Cave narrow tunnel and Asgarnian Ice Dungeon wyvern tunnel.
translation: 你现在可以进入神圣墓穴3层，以及使用要塞杀戮者洞穴的狭窄隧道捷径和阿斯加尼亚冰原地牢的飞龙隧道捷径。

english: You can now use the Troll Stronghold wall-climb and the western descent at the Arceuus essence mine.
translation: 你现在可以使用巨魔要塞的墙壁攀爬捷径和阿西乌斯城精华矿西部的攀降捷径。

english: You can now use the Lava Dragon Isle lava jump and the Meiyerditch Laboratory tunnels.
translation: 你现在可以使用熔岩龙岛熔岩的跳跃捷径和迈尔迪奇实验室的隧道捷径。

english: You can now use the Prifddinas Agility Course, the medium Revenant Cave shortcuts.
translation: 你现在可以使用普里夫迪纳斯敏捷训练场和中级亡灵洞穴捷径。

english: You can now use the island crossing near Zul-Andra.
translation: 你现在可以使用祖尔安德拉附近跨越岛屿的踏脚石捷径。

english: You can now use the Wilderness Slayer Dungeon Crevices.
translation: 你现在可以使用荒野杀戮者地牢的裂缝捷径。

english: You can now use the Iorwerth Dungeon northern shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用伊尔沃斯地牢北部的捷径。

english: You can now use the Kharazi Jungle vine climb and the Shilo village north rock climb shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用卡拉兹丛林藤蔓的攀爬捷径和希洛村北部的攀岩捷径。

english: You can now use the Rellekka course and the Taverley Dungeon spiked blades jump Agility shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用雷勒卡敏捷训练场和塔韦利地牢的尖刺跳跃捷径。

english: You can now use the Waterbirth dungeon crevice shortcut and the Slayer Tower ivy climb.
translation: 你现在可以使用水诞岛地牢的裂缝捷径和杀戮者之塔的常春藤攀爬捷径。

english: You can now enter Floor 4 of the Hallowed Sepulchre and use the Lava Maze stepping stone shortcut, and the Adept Asgarnian Ice Dungeon wyvern tunnel.
translation: 你现在可以进入神圣墓穴4层，以及使用熔岩迷宫的踏脚石捷径，以及专家级阿斯加尼亚冰原地牢的飞龙隧道。

english: You can now use the Brimhaven Dungeon eastern stepping stones shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用布尔哈文地牢东部的踏脚石捷径。

english: You can now use the Iorwerth Dungeon southern shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用伊尔沃斯地牢南部的捷径。

english: You can now use the Elven Overpass advanced cliffside scramble and the Waterbirth Island cliffside scale.
translation: 你现在可以使用精灵天桥的高难悬崖攀爬捷径和水诞岛的悬崖攀爬捷径。

english: You can now use the Kalphite Lair crevice and the Darkmeyer wall jump.
translation: 你现在可以使用卡尔夫特虫巢的裂缝捷径和达克迈尔的墙壁跳跃捷径。

english: You can now use the Brimhaven Dungeon vine climb.
translation: 你现在可以使用布尔哈文地牢的藤蔓攀爬捷径。

english: You can now use the Karuulm dungeon pipe shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用卡鲁尔姆地牢的管道捷径。

english: You can now use the hard Revenant cave shortcuts.
translation: 你现在可以使用困难亡灵洞穴捷径。

english: You can now use the Ardougne course.
translation: 你现在可以使用阿多尼敏捷训练场。

english: You can now use the Viyeldi Caves cliff shortcut.
translation: 你现在可以使用维耶尔迪洞穴的悬崖捷径。

english: You can now enter Floor 5 of the Hallowed Sepulchre.
translation: 你现在可以进入神圣墓穴5层。

english: You can now use the advanced shortcut to the Meiyerditch Laboratories (with 78 mining).
translation: 你现在可以使用通往迈尔迪奇实验室的高难捷径 (需要78级采矿)。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Agility. Why not visit the Cap'n Izzy No-beard at the Brimhaven Agility Arena? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Agility skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是敏捷大师。为何不去布尔哈文敏捷竞技场拜访没有胡子的伊兹船长？他有唯有真正的敏捷技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Your Attack level is used to determine how likely you are to hit your target in melee combat. A higher Attack level will give you a better chance to hit.
translation: 你的攻击等级决定你在近战中击中目标的几率。更高的攻击等级将为你提供更高的命中率。

english: Additionally, a higher Attack level will allow you to wield more powerful weapons. A weapon with a higher Attack bonus will give you more accuracy in combat.
translation: 此外，更高的攻击等级将允许你装备更强大的武器。具有更高攻击加成的武器将为你提供更高的战斗命中率。

english: You can select your Attack style from the Combat Options side panel. Different enemies are weaker or stronger against different Attack styles, so choose carefully.
translation: 你可以从战斗选项面板选择你的攻击风格，不同敌人对不同攻击风格的弱点和抗性不同，请谨慎选择。

english: You can now wield Steel Weaponry!
translation: 你现在可以装备钢制武器！

english: You can now wield Black Weaponry and members can wield White Weaponry!
translation: 你现在可以装备黑铁武器，会员可以装备白骑士武器！

english: You can now wield Mithril Weaponry!
translation: 你现在可以装备秘银武器！

english: You can now wield Adamant Weaponry and members can wield Swamp Lizards and Bryophyta's Staff!
translation: 你现在可以装备精金武器，会员可以装备沼泽蜥蜴和布赖奥菲塔的法杖！

english: You can now wield Rune Weaponry and Barronite maces. Members can wield Brine Sabres and Ivandis Flails!
translation: 你现在可以装备符文武器和巴隆石钉锤。会员可以装备盐水弯刀和伊凡迪斯连枷！

english: Members can now wield Void Knight equipment!
translation: 会员现在可以装备虚空骑士装备！

english: Members can now wield Granite weapons, Blisterwood weapons, Keris daggers and the Ancient Sceptre!
translation: 会员现在可以装备花岗岩武器、水泡木武器、克里西斯匕首和古代权杖！

english: Members can now wield Dragon Weaponry, Viggora's Chainmace, The Colossal Blade, Red Salamanders and the Keris Partisan!
translation: 会员现在可以装备龙金武器、维戈拉的链枷、巨型刀刃、红色蝾螈和克里西斯阔头枪！

english: You can now wield the 3rd age longsword, 3rd Age Druidic staff (with 65 prayer), the Sarachnis Cudgel and Keris partisans!
translation: 你现在可以装备第三纪元长剑、第三纪元德鲁伊法杖 (需要65级祈祷)、萨拉奇尼斯短棒和克里西斯阔头枪！

english: Members can now wield the Saradomin Sword, the Abyssal Whip & Dagger, the Zamorak Spear, the Ursine Chainmace, Crystal Equipment and Barrows weaponry!
translation: 会员现在可以使用萨拉多明剑、深渊鞭与匕首、扎莫拉克长矛、熊爪链枷、水晶装备和巴罗斯武器！

english: Members can now wield Black Salamanders, the Saradomin Sword, the Abyssal Whip & Dagger, the Zamorak Spear, the Ursine Chainmace, Crystal Equipment and Barrows weaponry!
translation: 会员现在可以装备黑色蝾螈、萨拉多明剑、深渊鞭与匕首、扎莫拉克长矛、熊爪链枷、水晶装备和巴罗斯武器！

english: Members can now wield the Saradomin Sword, the Abyssal Whip, Dagger & Bludgeon, the Zamorak Spear, the Ursine Chainmace, Crystal Equipment and Barrows weaponry!
translation: 会员现在可以装备萨拉多明剑、深渊鞭、匕首与棍棒、扎莫拉克长矛、熊爪链枷、水晶装备和巴罗斯武器！

english: Members can now wield Black Salamanders, the Saradomin Sword, the Abyssal Whip, Dagger & Bludgeon, the Zamorak Spear, the Ursine Chainmace, Crystal Equipment and Barrows weaponry!
translation: 会员现在可以装备黑色蝾螈、萨拉多明剑、深渊鞭、匕首与棍棒、扎莫拉克长矛、熊爪链枷、水晶装备和巴罗斯武器！

english: Members can now wield Godswords, the Blessed Saradomin Sword, Abyssal Tentacle, Staff of the Dead, Staff of Light, Staff of Balance, Dinh's Bulwark, Arclight, Vesta's blighted longsword and the Voidwaker!
translation: 会员现在可以装备神剑、被祝福的萨拉多明剑、深渊触手、死亡法杖、光明法杖、平衡法杖、丁的门盾、弧光剑、维斯塔的诅咒长剑和虚空觉醒者！

english: Members can now wield the Dragon Hunter Lance!
translation: 会员现在可以装备猎龙长矛！

english: Members can now wield the Scythe of Vitur, the Ghrazi Rapier, the Inquisitor's Mace, the Blade of Saeldor and the upgraded Keris Partisan!
translation: 会员现在可以装备维图尔镰刀、格拉兹细剑、审判官钉锤、赛尔多尔之刃和升级版的克里西斯阔头枪！

english: Members can now wield Osmumten's Fang!
translation: 会员现在可以装备奥斯穆滕毒牙！

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Attack. Why not visit Ajjat at the Warriors' Guild? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Attack skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是攻击大师。为何不去战士公会拜访阿加特？他有唯有真正的攻击技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Construction gives you access to your very owned Player-Owned House. To get started, you'll need to buy a house from an Estate agent.
translation: 建筑技能让你拥有自己的玩家专属房屋。要开始学习这门技能，你需要先从地产经纪人那里购买一所房屋。

english: Once you have a house, you'll need to build furniture. Most furniture can be built with planks, which can be obtained via taking logs to a sawmill.
translation: 拥有房屋后你需要建造家具，大多数家具可用木板建造。木板可通过将原木送到锯木厂加工获得。

english: To build furniture, grab a hammer and a saw, enter your house in build mode, select a hotspot and select the furniture you want to build.
translation: 要建造家具，请拿起锤子和锯子并以建造模式进入你的房子，选择一个热点并选择你想建造的家具。

english: As your Construction level increases, you'll be able to build bigger houses, gain access to more kinds of room in your house, and be able to build fancier furniture.
translation: 随着你的建筑等级提高，你将能够建造更大的房屋，建造更多种类的房间，并能够建造更华丽的家具。

english: You'll also become able to build better facilities for boats.
translation: 你还将能够建造更好的船只相关设施。

translation: 恭喜！你现在是建筑大师。为何不去拜访地产经纪人？他有唯有真正的建筑技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Cooking is a skill that lets you make all kinds of delicious food that will typically restore your Hitpoints, amongst providing other benefits.
translation: 烹饪是一项技能，让你可以制作各种美味食物，通常能恢复你的生命值，同时提供其他益处。

english: At its most basic, Cooking can be done by simply taking raw meats and fish to either a fire or a range. You'll get better results overall if you use a range, though.
translation: 最基础的烹饪方式，只需将生肉或生鱼带到火或炉灶旁即可进行。不过，如果你使用炉灶，总体效果会更好。

english: Some foods will require you to prepare your ingredients before you can cook them. For example, you first need to mix flour and water into a dough before you can bake them into bread.
translation: 有些食物需要你在烹饪前准备材料。例如，你需要先将面粉和水混合成面团，然后才能将其烤成面包。

english: As your Cooking level increases, you'll get access to an increasing list of recipes. You'll also find that you accidentally burn your food less of the time as well.
translation: 随着你的烹饪等级提高，你将可以使用越来越多的食谱。你还会发现你意外烧焦食物的几率也会降低。

english: You can now cook herring.
translation: 你现在可以烹饪鲱鱼。

translation: 会员现在可以制作水果鸡尾酒。

translation: 会员现在可以制作辣酱。

translation: 会员现在可以制作黄油乳酪烤土豆并烹饪鱼派。

translation: 你现在可以烹饪巧克力蛋糕。

translation: 会员现在可以制作鸡蛋番茄烤土豆并烹饪剑齿虎。

translation: 会员现在可以烹饪熔岩鳗。

translation: 会员现在可以酿造厨师的喜悦。

translation: 会员现在可以制作炸蘑菇和洋葱。

translation: 会员现在可以制作蘑菇洋葱烤土豆。

translation: 会员现在可以烹饪菠萝披萨并制作扎莫拉克葡萄酒。

translation: 会员现在可以解剖圣鳗鱼。

translation: 会员现在可以烹饪罗奎德鱼和默恩格蝙蝠。

translation: 会员现在可以烹饪黄鳍金枪鱼。

translation: 会员现在可以烹饪鲨鱼。

translation: 会员现在可以烹饪安康鱼。

translation: 会员现在可以烹饪野味派并制作地狱鱼叉。

translation: 会员现在可以烹饪黑暗蟹、凯伦鱼和赛克蝙蝠。

english: Members can now cook manta rays.
translation: 会员现在可以烹饪魔鬼鱼。

english: Members can now cook moonlight antelope.
translation: 会员现在可以烹饪月光羚羊。

english: Members can now cook summer pie.
translation: 会员现在可以烹饪夏日派。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Cooking. Why not visit the head chef at the Cooking Guild? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Cooking skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是烹饪大师。为何不去厨师公会拜访主厨？他有唯有真正的烹饪技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Crafting is a wide-ranging skill that allows you to create various pieces of armour, jewellery, equipment and more.
translation: 制作是一项广泛的技能，让你可以制作各种盔甲、首饰、装备等。

english: To craft armour out of animal hides, you'll typically first need to take the hides to a tanner to get them tanned, then combine them with a needle and thread, which can be acquired from certain crafting shops in the world.
translation: 要用动物皮制作盔甲，你通常首先需要将兽皮带到鞣皮师那里鞣制，然后用针和线缝合，针线可以从世界上某些制作商店获得。

english: To make pottery, you'll need to obtain some soft clay, obtained by adding water to clay. You can then use a pottery wheel to shape the clay into an unfired item, which you can then finish in a pottery oven.
translation: 要制作陶器，你需要获得一些软粘土，通过向粘土加水制成。然后你可以使用陶轮将粘土塑造成未烧制的陶器，然后在陶器烤箱中烧制完成。

english: To make jewellery, you'll need to first get a crafting mould. You can then take that mould and some gold or silver bars to a furnace to craft your jewellery. At higher crafting levels, you can cut gems and mould them simultaneously to create jewellery which you can enchant!
translation: 要制作首饰，你首先需要获得一个制作模具。然后你可以将模具和一些金锭或银锭带到熔炉制作你的首饰。在更高的制作等级，你可以切割宝石并同时塑形以制作可以附魔的首饰！

english: Members can now craft cups and polished buttons.
translation: 会员现在可以制作杯子和已抛光的纽扣。

english: Members can now craft candle lanterns.
translation: 会员现在可以制作蜡烛灯笼。

english: You can now craft gold rings and members can now craft standard birdhouses.
translation: 你现在可以制作金戒指，会员现在可以制作普通的鸟屋。

english: You can now craft gold necklaces.
translation: 你现在可以制作金项链。

english: You can now craft boots, pie dishes and gold bracelets.
translation: 你现在可以制作靴子、派烤盘和金手镯。

english: You can now craft bowls and gold amulets.
translation: 你现在可以制作碗和金护符。

english: You can now craft leather cowls.
translation: 你现在可以制作皮帽。

translation: 会员现在可以制作弓弦和弩弦。

english: You can now craft leather vambraces.
translation: 你现在可以制作皮护臂。

english: Members can now craft oil lamps.
translation: 会员现在可以制作油灯。

english: Members can now cut jade and craft jade rings.
translation: 会员现在可以切割翡翠并制作翡翠戒指。

english: You can now make leather armour. Members can make Xerician hats.
translation: 你现在可以制作皮甲。会员可以制作泽里克西亚帽。

english: Members can now make snail shell helmets (snelms), crab shell armour and oak birdhouses.
translation: 会员现在可以制作蜗牛壳头盔、蟹壳盔甲和橡木鸟屋。

english: You can now craft holy symbols of Saradomin. Members can cut red topaz and craft red topaz rings and opal necklace.
translation: 你现在可以制作萨拉多明神圣护符。会员可以切割红托帕石并制作红托帕石戒指和蛋白石项链。

english: Members can now craft unholy symbols of Zamorak and Xerician robes.
translation: 会员现在可以制作扎莫拉克的邪恶护符和泽里克西亚长袍。

english: You can now craft leather chaps. There is more information available from the Crafting Tutor in Lumbridge Castle. Members can make silver sickles.
translation: 你现在可以制作皮裤。仑桥镇城堡的制作导师那里有新的讯息。会员可以制作银镰刀。

english: Members can now craft plant pots and spin magic tree roots into magic strings.
translation: 会员现在可以制作花盆并将魔法树根纺成魔法线。

english: You can now cut sapphires and craft sapphire rings.
translation: 你现在可以切割蓝宝石并制作蓝宝石戒指。

english: Members can now weave sacks and craft silver crossbow bolts.

english: Your Defence level determines how likely you are to block enemy attacks. The chances of this happening increase with your level, but be careful; you are never guaranteed to block every attack!
translation: 你的防御等级决定你格挡敌人攻击的几率，而格挡几率随你的等级增加。但要小心，你从不保证能格挡每一次攻击！

english: Additionally, a higher Defence level will allow you to equip more powerful shields and armour. As well as giving you better defensive stats, some armour will also increase your Attack or Strength bonuses as well.
translation: 此外，更高的防御等级将让你能够装备更强大的盾牌和盔甲。除了提供更好的防御属性外，一些盔甲还会增加你的攻击或力量加成。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Defence. Why not visit Harlan in Lumbridge? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Defence skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是防御大师。为何不去仑桥镇拜访哈兰？他有唯有真正的防御技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Farming allows you to grow various flowers, vegetables, trees, herbs and more in farming patches across Gielinor.
translation: 农业技能让你可以在基利诺尔各地的种植地种植各种花卉、蔬菜、树木、草药等。

english: To get started, you'll need some seeds and a seed dibber, as well as a rake to de-weed the patch you want to use.
translation: 你需要一些种子和一个种植锥来开始种植，以及一个耙子来为你想使用的种植地除草。

english: Once you've cleared the patch, you can add your seed to it. You can also optionally water it with a watering can or add a bucket of compost to decrease the chances of your plant becoming diseased.
translation: 清理完种植地后，即可播下种子。你也可以选择用浇水壶浇水，或施加一桶堆肥，以降低植物染病的几率。

english: It'll take a while for your plant to grow, so feel free to explore the world and come back to it later!
translation: 你的植物需要一段时间才能生长，所以你可以随意探索世界，稍后再回来查看！

english: Once your plant has grown, you might need another tool to collect the harvest. For instance, you'll need a spade to dig up potatoes.
translation: 植物成熟后，你可能需要其他工具来收获作物。例如挖土豆就需要用到铲子。

english: If you're worried about your crops becoming diseased, most crops can be protected by the nearby gardeners, but they'll want specific produce in return.
translation: 如果你担心作物染病，大多数作物可以由附近的园丁保护，但他们想要特定的农产品作为回报。

english: As your Farming level increases, you'll gain access to more crops to grow, as well as obtaining[sic] greater yields when harvesting.
translation: 随着你的农业等级提高，你将获得种植更多种类作物的权限，并在收获时获得更高产量。

translation: 你现在可以种植紫杉树。

english: You can now grow Snape Grass and get triple maple roots.
translation: 你现在可以种植斯内普草并获得三倍数量的枫树根。

english: You can now grow Snapdragon.
translation: 你现在可以种植金鱼草。

english: You can now grow Belladonna.
translation: 你现在可以种植颠茄。

english: You can now grow Potato cacti.
translation: 你现在可以种植土豆仙人掌。

english: You can now access the Farming Guild - Mid tier and grow Hespori.
translation: 你现在可以进入农业公会中层并种植赫斯波里。

english: You can now grow Cadantine.
translation: 你现在可以种植卡丹丁草。

english: You can now grow Palm Trees and get double yew roots.
translation: 你现在可以种植棕榈树并获得双倍数量的紫杉树根。

english: You can now get quadruple maple roots.
translation: 你现在可以获得四倍数量的枫树根。

english: You can now grow Poison Ivy bushes.
translation: 你现在可以种植毒藤灌木。

english: You can now grow Calquat Trees.
translation: 你现在可以种植卡夸特树。

english: You can now grow Lantadyme.
translation: 你现在可以种植兰塔丁草。

english: You can now grow Logavano fruit in Hosidius and Crystal trees in Prifddinas.
translation: 你现在可以在霍西迪乌斯城种植洛加瓦诺果并在普里夫迪纳斯城种植水晶树。

english: You can now grow Magic Trees.
translation: 你现在可以种植魔法树。

english: You can now grow Anima plants and get triple yew roots.
translation: 你现在可以种植灵能植物并获得三倍数量的紫杉树根。

english: You can now grow Dwarf Weed.
translation: 你现在可以种植矮人草。

english: You can now grow Dragonfruit Trees.
translation: 你现在可以种植火龙果树。

english: You can now grow Spirit Trees and get double magic roots.
translation: 你现在可以种植灵魂树并获得双倍数量的魔法树根。

english: You can now get quadruple yew roots.
translation: 你现在可以获得四倍数量的紫杉树根。

english: You can now access the Farming Guild - High tier. You can also grow Torstol, and access Celastrus Trees.
translation: 你现在可以进入农业公会高层。你还可以种植托斯托尔草和南蛇藤树。

english: You can now grow Redwood Trees.
translation: 你现在可以种植红杉树。

english: You can now plant 2 spirit trees at a time and get triple magic roots.
translation: 你现在可以一次种植两棵灵魂树并获得三倍数量的魔法树根。

english: You can now grow Rosewood trees.
translation: 你现在可以种植玫瑰木树。

english: You can now plant three Spirit Trees at at ime.
translation: 你现在可以一次种植3棵灵魂树。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Farming. Why not visit Martin the Master Gardener in Draynor Village? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Farming skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是农业大师。为何不去德雷诺村拜访园艺大师马丁？他有唯有真正的农业技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: You can now plant unlimited spirit trees at a time and get quadruple magic roots.
translation: 你现在可以一次种植无限棵灵魂树并获得四倍数量的魔法树根。

english: Firemaking is a skill that allows you to make fires. To do so, simply use a tinderbox on a set of logs and you'll attempt to light them on fire.
translation: 生火是一项让你可以点燃火堆的技能。要生火的话只需对原木使用火绒盒，你就可以尝试点燃它们。

english: Higher Firemaking levels will allow you to burn logs that grant more experience, as well as allowing you to burn them quicker.
translation: 更高的生火等级将让你可以点燃给予更多经验的原木和更快地点燃它们。

english: Members can now light Candle Lanterns.
translation: 会员现在可以点亮蜡烛灯笼。

english: Members can now burn Pyre Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧火葬原木。

english: Members can now light oil lamps.
translation: 会员现在可以点亮油灯。

english: You can now burn Oak Logs and light an Abyssal Lantern with Oak Logs.
translation: 你现在可以燃烧橡木原木并用橡木原木点亮深渊灯笼。

english: Members can now burn Oak Pyre Logs and use Iron Spits.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧火葬用橡木原木以及使用铁制烤肉叉。

english: Members can now light Oil Lanterns.
translation: 会员现在可以点亮油灯笼。

english: You can now burn Willow Logs and light an Abyssal Lantern with Willow Logs.
translation: 你现在可以燃烧柳木原木并用柳木原木点亮深渊灯笼。

english: Members can now light Harpie Bug Lanterns.
translation: 会员现在可以点亮哈比虫灯笼。

english: Members can now burn Teak Logs and Willow Pyre Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧柚木原木和火葬用柳木原木。

english: Members can now burn Teak Pyre Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧火葬用柚木原木。

english: Members can now burn Arctic Pine Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧火葬用北极松原木。

english: You can now burn Maple Logs and light an Abyssal Lantern with Maple Logs.
translation: 你现在可以燃烧枫木原木并用枫木原木点亮深渊灯笼。

english: Members can now burn Arctic Pine Pyre Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧火葬用北极松原木。

english: Members can now light Bullseye Lanterns, Emerald Lanterns and Sapphire Lanterns.
translation: 会员现在可以点亮聚光灯笼，绿宝石灯笼和蓝宝石灯笼。

english: Members can now burn Mahogany Logs, burn Maple Pyre Logs, wield Bruma torches and enter the Wintertodt's prison.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧红木原木和火葬用枫木原木，使用布鲁玛火把并进入寒冬监狱。

english: Members can now replace Dorgeshuun Light Orbs.
translation: 会员现在可以替换多格舒恩光球。

english: Members can now burn Mahogany Pyre Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧火葬用红木原木。

english: You can now burn Yew Logs and light an Abyssal Lantern with Yew Logs.
translation: 你现在可以燃烧紫杉原木并用紫杉原木点亮深渊灯笼。

english: You can now burn Blisterwood Logs and light an Abyssal Lantern with Blisterwood Logs.
translation: 你现在可以燃烧水泡木原木并用水泡木原木点亮深渊灯笼。

english: Members can now light Cave Goblin Mining Helmets and burn Yew Pyre Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以点亮洞穴哥布林采矿头盔并燃烧火葬用紫杉原木。

english: Members can now light Troll Fires.
translation: 会员现在可以点燃巨魔火堆。

english: You can now burn Larch Logs.
translation: 你现在可以燃烧落叶松原木。

english: Members can now burn Camphor Pyre Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧火葬用樟木原木。

english: Members can now burn Magic Logs and light an Abyssal Lantern with Magic Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧魔法原木并用魔法原木点亮深渊灯笼。

english: Members can now burn Magic Pyre Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧火葬用魔法原木。

english: Members can now create Infernal Axes.
translation: 会员现在可以制作地狱斧。

english: Members can now burn Redwood Logs and light an Abyssal Lantern with Redwood Logs.
translation: 会员现在可以燃烧红杉原木并用红杉原木点亮深渊灯笼。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Firemaking. Why not visit Ignatius, south of Seers' Village? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Firmaking skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是生火大师。为何不去先知村以南拜访伊格内修斯？他有唯有真正的生火技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Fishing allows you to gather fish at various points across Gielinor. Typically, these will be indicated by moving bubbles on the surface of the water.
translation: 钓鱼技能让你可在基利诺尔各地的钓鱼点捕鱼。通常这些钓鱼点会以水面上的移动气泡标示。

english: Different fish require different equipment to catch; for instance, you need a fishing net to catch shrimp, but a fishing rod and bait to catch sardines.
translation: 不同鱼类需要不同装备才能捕获。例如你需要渔网来捕虾，但需要鱼竿和鱼饵来钓沙丁鱼。

english: As your Fishing level increases, you'll gain access to more varieties of fish to catch, as well as having a higher chance of successfully catching fish when you try.
translation: 随着钓鱼等级提高，你可捕获的鱼类种类也会增加，同时提高捕鱼成功率。

english: You can now try fishing for sardines. Members can now try fishing for karambwanji.
translation: 你现在可以尝试钓沙丁鱼。会员现在可以尝试捕捞卡拉姆班小鱼。

english: You can now try fishing for guppies.
translation: 你现在可以尝试捕捞孔雀鱼。

english: You can now try fishing for herring.
translation: 你现在可以尝试钓鲱鱼。

english: You can now try to net anchovies. Members can collect fresh fish from Piscarilius docks and catch Suphi fish.
translation: 你现在可以尝试用网捕捞凤尾鱼。会员可以从皮斯卡里琉斯码头收集鲜鱼并钓苏菲鱼。

english: Members can now try fishing for mackerel, oysters and caskets with a large net.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试用大渔网捕捞鲭鱼、牡蛎和宝箱。

english: You can now try fly fishing for trout and cavefish. Members can try fishing for Bream with a big net in Neypotzli.
translation: 你现在可以尝试飞钓鳟鱼和洞鱼。会员可以尝试在内波茨利监狱用大渔网捕捞鲷鱼。

english: Members can now try fishing for cod with a large net.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试用大渔网捕捞鳕鱼。

english: You can now try fishing for pike.
translation: 你现在可以尝试钓狗鱼。

english: Members can now try fishing for slimy eels.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试钓黏液鳗。

english: New information is available from the Fishing Tutor south of Lumbridge.
translation: 仑桥镇以南的钓鱼导师那里有新的讯息。

english: You can now try fly fishing for salmon. Members can catch Leckish fish.
translation: 你现在可以尝试飞钓鲑鱼。会员可以钓莱克什鱼。

english: You can now try fishing for tetra. Members can now try to net giant frogspawn.
translation: 你现在可以尝试捕捞四齿鱼。会员现在可以尝试用网捕获巨型蛙卵。

english: Members can now wear the Angler outfit.
translation: 会员现在可以装备钓鱼者服装。

english: You can now try harpooning tuna. Members can now fight the Tempoross.
translation: 你现在可以尝试用鱼叉捕获金枪鱼。会员现在可以与海灵战斗。

english: Members can now try fishing for cave eels and rainbow fish.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试钓洞穴鳗和彩虹鱼。

english: You can now try to catch lobsters.
translation: 你现在可以尝试捕捞龙虾。

english: Members can now catch bluegill on Molch Island (with 35 hunter).
translation: 会员现在可以在莫尔奇岛捕获蓝鳃鱼 (需要35级猎人)。

english: Members can now catch Brawk fish.
translation: 会员现在可以钓布劳克鱼。

english: Members can now try fishing for sea bass and catfish with a large net.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试用大渔网捕捞海鲈鱼和鲶鱼。

english: Members can now access drift net fishing on fossil island[sic] (with 44 hunter).
translation: 会员现在可以进入化石岛用流刺网捕获鱼 (需要44级猎人)。

english: Members can now try fishing for leaping trout.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试钓跃起的鳟鱼。

english: You can now try harpooning swordfish.
translation: 你现在可以尝试用鱼叉捕获剑鱼。

english: Members can now try catching lava eels.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试钓熔岩鳗。

english: Members can now catch common tench on Molch Island (with 51 hunter).
translation: 会员现在可以在莫尔奇岛捕获普通的丁鲷 (需要51级猎人)。

english: Members can now try fishing for leaping salmon.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试钓跃起的鲑鱼。

english: Members can now catch Mycil fish.
translation: 会员现在可以钓迈希尔鱼。

english: Members can now use dragon harpoons.
translation: 会员现在可以使用龙金鱼叉。

english: Members can now try netting monkfish.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试用网捕捞僧侣鱼。

english: Members can now try catching karambwan.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试捕获卡拉姆班鱼。

english: Members are now qualified to enter the Fishing Guild.
translation: 会员现在有资格进入钓公会。

english: Members can now try fishing for leaping sturgeon.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试钓跃起的鲟鱼。

english: Members can now use crystal harpoons.
translation: 会员现在可以使用水晶鱼叉。

english: Members can now catch mottled eel on Molch Island (with 68 hunter).
translation: 会员现在可以在莫尔奇岛捕获斑驳鳗 (需要68级猎人)。

english: Members can now catch Roqed fish.
translation: 会员现在可以钓罗奎德鱼。

english: Members can now catch Roqed fish and create the infernal harpoon.
translation: 会员现在可以钓罗奎德鱼并制作地狱鱼叉。

english: Members can now try harpooning sharks and fish from glistening shoals.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试用鱼叉捕获斑鲨鱼并从闪耀的鱼群中钓鱼。

english: Members can now catch sea turtles.
translation: 会员现在可以捕获海龟。

english: Members can now catch infernal eels in Mor Ul Rek.
translation: 会员现在可以在莫尔乌尔雷克钓地狱鳗。

english: Members can now catch manta rays.
translation: 会员现在可以捕获魔鬼鱼。

english: Members can now catch anglerfish in Port Piscarilius and minnows in the Fishing Guild.
translation: 会员现在可以在皮斯卡里琉斯港钓安康鱼并在钓鱼公会捕捞米诺鱼。

english: Members can now catch Dark Crabs in the Wilderness.
translation: 会员现在可以在荒野捕捞黑暗蟹。

english: Members can now catch sacred eels in Zul-Andra.
translation: 会员现在可以在祖尔安德拉钓圣鳗鱼。

english: Members can now catch Kyren fish.
translation: 会员现在可以钓凯伦鱼。

english: Members can now catch greater siren on Molch Island (with 87 hunter).
translation: 会员现在可以在莫尔奇岛捕获大海牛 (需要87级猎人)。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Fishing. Why not visit the Master Fisherman at the Fishing Guild? There you can buy something special that is only available to true masters of the Fishing skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是钓鱼大师。为何不去钓鱼公会拜访钓鱼大师？在那里你可以购买只有真正的钓鱼技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Fletching allows you to create various ranged weapons, as well as ammunition to go with them.
translation: 制箭允许你制作各种远程武器，以及与之配套的弹药。

english: Making bows requires bowstring, which can be made from flax at a spinning wheel. You can use a knife on some logs to carve an unfinished bow, then add the bowstring to complete the weapon.
translation: 制作弓需要弓弦，弓弦可以在纺车上用亚麻制作。你可以用刀在一些原木上削出未完成的弓，然后装上弓弦来完成武器。

english: To create arrows, you’ll first need to carve logs into arrow shafts with a knife, then tip the arrow shafts with feathers. Finally, you’ll need to add some arrow heads.
translation: 要制作箭，你首先需要用刀将原木削成箭杆，然后用羽毛给箭杆装上羽饰。最后，你需要装上一些箭头。

english: To make bolts, you only need to combine unfinished bolts with feathers. You can also chisel gemstones down into bolt tips, with each gemstone being able to top a different bolt.
translation: 要制作弩箭，你只需要将未完成的弩箭与羽毛组合。你也可以将宝石凿成弩箭头，每种宝石可以用于不同类型的弩箭。

english: You can now make bronze javelins.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜标枪。

english: You can now make shortbows.
translation: 你现在可以制作短弓。

english: You can now make bronze 'brutal' arrows.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜残暴箭。

english: You can now make bronze/wooden crossbows and bronze crossbow bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜弩、木制弩和青铜弩箭。

english: You can now make longbows.
translation: 你现在可以制作长弓。

english: You can now make opal tipped bronze bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作蛋白石箭头的青铜弩箭。

english: You can now make iron arrows.
translation: 你现在可以制作铁箭。

english: You can now make iron javelins.
translation: 你现在可以制作铁制标枪。

english: You can now make iron 'brutal' arrows.
translation: 你现在可以制作铁制残暴箭。

english: You can now craft oak shortbows.
translation: 你现在可以制作橡木短弓。

english: You can now make iron darts.
translation: 你现在可以制作铁制飞镖。

english: You can now make oak longbows.
translation: 你现在可以制作橡木长弓。

english: You can now make jade tipped blurite bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作翡翠箭头的蓝铁弩箭。

english: You can now fletch oak shields.
translation: 你现在可以制作橡木盾。

english: You can now make steel arrows and composite ogre bows.
translation: 你现在可以制作钢箭和复合食人魔弓。

english: You can now make kebbit tipped bolts and steel javelins.
translation: 你现在可以制作凯比特兔箭头的弩箭和钢制标枪。

english: You can now make steel 'brutal' arrows.
translation: 你现在可以制作钢制残暴箭。

english: You can now make willow shortbows and bone shortbows.
translation: 你现在可以制作柳木短弓和骨制短弓。

english: You can now make steel darts.
translation: 你现在可以制作钢制飞镖。

english: You can now make black brutal arrows.
translation: 你现在可以制作黑铁残暴箭。

english: You can now make iron/willow crossbows and iron crossbow bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作铁制弩、柳木弩和铁制弩箭。

english: You can now make willow longbows and battlestaves.
translation: 你现在可以制作柳木长弓和战杖。

english: You can now make pearl tipped iron bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作珍珠箭头的铁制弩箭。

english: You can now make long kebbit tipped bolts and fletch willow shields.
translation: 你现在可以制作长凯比特兔箭头的弩箭并制作柳木盾。

english: You can now make silver crossbow bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作银弩箭。

english: You can now make mithril arrows.
translation: 你现在可以制作秘银箭。

english: You can now make steel/teak crossbows and steel crossbow bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作钢制弩、柚木弩和钢制弩箭。

english: You can now make a light ballista and mithril javelins.
translation: 你现在可以制作轻型弩炮和秘银标枪。

english: You can now make red topaz tipped steel bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作红托帕石箭头的钢制弩箭。

english: You can now make mithril 'brutal' arrows.
translation: 你现在可以制作秘银残暴箭。

english: You can now make maple shortbows.
translation: 你现在可以制作枫木短弓。

english: You can now make barbed tipped bronze bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作倒钩箭头的青铜弩箭。

english: You can now make mithril darts and broad arrows.
translation: 你现在可以制作秘银飞镖和宽箭。

english: You can now make mithril/maple crossbows and mithril crossbow bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作秘银弩、枫木弩和秘银弩箭。

english: You can now make maple longbows and broad bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作枫木长弓和宽弩箭。

english: You can now make sapphire tipped mithril bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作蓝宝石箭头的秘银弩箭。

english: You can now fletch maple shields.
translation: 你现在可以制作枫木盾。

english: You can now make emerald tipped mithril bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作祖母绿箭头的秘银弩箭。

english: You can now make mithril grapples.
translation: 你现在可以制作秘银抓钩。

english: You can now make adamantite arrows and hunter's spears.
translation: 你现在可以制作精金箭和猎人长矛。

english: You can now make adamantite/mahogany crossbows and adamantite crossbow bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作精金弩、红木弩和精金弩箭。

english: You can now make adamant 'brutal' arrows, adamant javelins, and sunlight antler bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作精金残暴箭、精金标枪和日光羚羊角弩箭。

english: You can now make ruby tipped adamantite bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作红宝石箭头的精金弩箭。

english: You can now make yew shortbows and diamond tipped adamantite bolts.

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Fletching. Why not visit Hickton who runs the bow and arrow shop in Catherby? There you can buy something special that is only available to true masters of the Fletching
translation: 恭喜！你现在是制箭大师。为何不去凯瑟比镇拜访经营弓箭店的希克顿？在那里你可以购买只有真正的制箭技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: You must complete the Druidic Ritual quest before you can use Herblore.
translation: 你必须完成德鲁伊仪式任务才能使用草药学。

english: Herblore allows you to make potions with herbs and ingredients found across Gielinor.
translation: 草药学让你可以用基利诺尔各地发现的草药和材料制作药水。

english: To make a potion, you first need to clean a grimy herb, then combine it with a vial of water to make an unfinished potion. You can then add the secondary ingredient(s) to complete the potion.
translation: 要制作药水，你首先需要清洗脏草药，然后将其与水瓶结合制成未完成的药水。然后你可以添加次要材料来完成药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作攻击药水以及清洁瓜姆叶、蛇草和盗贼草。

english: You can now make attack mix.
translation: 你现在可以制作攻击混合药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作解毒剂以及清洁马伦提尔草。

translation: 你现在可以制作混合解毒剂。

translation: 你现在可以制作雷利姆混合药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作超级防御混合药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作抗火混合药水，清洁托斯托尔草，并调配中效诺克西弗花药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作魔法药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作耐力药水。

english: You can now make Zamorak brew, strong Buchu leaf potions and divine magic potions.
translation: 你现在可以制作扎莫拉克灵药、强效布楚叶药水和神圣魔法药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作超强解毒剂。

translation: 你现在可以制作射手混合药水，并用血瓶制作堡垒药水和战斗法师药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作魔法混合药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作耐力混合药水、神圣堡垒药水和神圣战斗法师药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作抗毒药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作梅纳菲特药剂。

english: You can now make super antifire potions(after Dragon Slayer II) and ancient mix.
translation: 你现在可以制作超级抗火药水 (完成屠龙者 II 后) 和先贤混合灵药。

english: You can now make anti-venom+ potions and extended anti-venom+ potions.
translation: 你现在可以制作抗毒药水 + 和长效抗毒药水 +。

english: You can now make divine super combat potions.
translation: 你现在可以制作神圣超级战斗药水。

translation: 你现在可以制作长效超级抗火药水 (完成屠龙者 II 后) 和超级抗火混合药水。

english: You can now make extended super antifire mix. Congratulations! You are now a master of Herblore. Why not visit Kaqemeex, near Taverley? He has something special that is only available to true masters
translation: 你现在可以制作长效超级抗火混合药水。恭喜！你现在是草药学大师。为何不去塔韦利村附近拜访卡基米克斯？他有唯有真正的草药学

english: of the Herblore skill!
translation: 技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Hitpoints are used to tell you how healthy your character is. A character who reaches 0 Hitpoints has died, but will reappear in their chosen respawn location (normally Lumbridge).
translation: 生命值用于显示你的角色健康状况。生命值归零的角色会死亡，但会在你选择的重生地点 (通常是仑桥镇) 重生。

english: As with any skill, you will restore 1 missing Hitpoint every minute, but the best way of recovering Hitpoints is by eating food.
translation: 与任何技能一样，你每分钟会自然恢复1点缺失的生命值，但恢复生命值的最佳方式是进食。

english: If you see any red 'hit splats' during combat, the number shown corresponds to the number of Hitpoints lost as a result of that strike.
translation: 如果你在战斗中看到任何红色''伤害数字''，显示的数字对应于该次攻击造成的生命值损失。

english: Blue hit splats mean no damage has been dealt.
translation: 蓝色伤害数字表示未造成伤害。

english: Green hit splats are poison damage.
translation: 绿色伤害数字表示中毒伤害。

english: Teal hit splats are venom damage. (Members)
translation: 青色伤害数字表示剧毒伤害。 (会员)

english: Orange hit splats are disease damage. (Members)
translation: 橙色伤害数字表示疾病伤害。 (会员)

english: Dark purple hit splats are corruption damage. (Members)
translation: 深紫色伤害数字表示腐化伤害。 (会员)

english: Members can now wield Void Knight equipment!
translation: 会员现在可以装备虚空骑士装备！

english: Members can now wield the Nightmare Staff!
translation: 会员现在可以装备梦魇法杖！

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Hitpoints. Why not visit Nurse Tafani at the Emir's Arena hospital? She has something special that is only available to true masters of the Hitpoint skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是生命值大师。为何不去埃米尔竞技场医院拜访塔法尼护士？她有只有真正的生命值技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Hunter lets you track and catch a wide variety of wildlife, granting access to various unique materials in the process.
translation: 狩猎技能让你追踪和捕捉各种野生动物，在此过程中获得各种独特材料。

english: Each animal you can hunt will typically be found in a specific locale, and will require different gear. Make sure you come prepared!
translation: 你可以狩猎的每种动物通常出现在特定地点，并需要不同的装备。确保你做好充分准备！

english: As your Hunter level improves, not only will you be able to hunt a wider variety of creatures, but you'll also be able to maintain more traps simultaneously, and they will successfully trap creatures more often.
translation: 随着你的狩猎等级提高，你不仅能狩猎更多种类的生物，还能同时设置更多陷阱，并且陷阱成功捕捉生物的几率也会提高。

english: You can now track common kebbits.

translation: 你现在可以捕捉雪白骑士蝶并在莫尔奇岛捕捉蓝鳃鱼 (需要43级钓鱼)。

translation: 你现在可以捕捉带刺凯比特兔。

english: Magic grants you access to a wide variety of spells. To cast each spell, you will need a specific set of runes. You can see the runes required by inspecting the spell in either the spellbook side-panel, or in their tab in this guide.
translation: 魔法技能让你可以使用多种多样的法术。施放每个法术都需要特定的符石。你可通过法术书面板或本指南中的标签查看施放每个法术所需的符石。

english: Click the spells in this guide to see the required runes to cast each spell. By opening the spellbook icon on the spellbook side-panel, you can see what each spell does by moving your mouse over its icon.

translation: 某些装备可替代某些符石来施放法术。例如，装备风元素法杖相当于提供无限供应的风符石。

english: Mining allows you to get various minerals from the world, for use in other skills; primarily Smithing.
translation: 采矿技能可让你从世界中获取各种矿物，用于其他技能，主要是锻造。

english: To mine a rock, simply interact with it while holding a pickaxe you have the level to use and you'll start mining it. Eventually, you'll collect the ore and the rock will deplete. Low level rocks will replenish themselves fairly quickly, but higher level ones will take longer and longer to come back.
translation: 要开采岩石，只需手持符合等级要求的镐子与岩石互动，即可开始开采。一段时间后你会收集到矿石，岩石会枯竭。低级岩石会相当快地再生，但高级岩石需要更长时间才能再生。

english: At higher mining levels, you'll have an increased chance of successfully mining a rock. You'll also be able to use more powerful pickaxes, which decrease the amount of time between mining attempts.
translation: 随着采矿等级的提升，你成功开采矿石的几率也会随之增加。此外你还能使用更强力的镐子，这会缩短每次开采之间的时间间隔。

english: Note that while most pickaxes have an Attack level requirement to equip them, you're still able to use them from within your inventory if you have the required Mining level.
translation: 请注意，虽然大多数镐子有攻击等级要求才能装备，但如果有所需的采矿等级，仍可从物品栏中直接使用。

english: You can now mine with steel pickaxes.
translation: 你现在可以使用钢制镐开采。

english: Members can now mine size-1 stars.
translation: 会员现在可以开采1级星星。

english: You can now mine with black pickaxes.
translation: 你现在可以使用黑铁镐开采。

english: You can now mine Barronite.

english: You can now mine Iron.
translation: 你现在可以开采铁。

english: You can now mine Silver. Members can now equip Mining gloves and mine size-2 stars.
translation: 你现在可以开采银。会员现在可以装备采矿手套并开采2级星星。

english: You can now mine with mithril pickaxes.
translation: 你现在可以使用秘银镐开采。

english: Members can now mine Volcanic ash.
translation: 会员现在可以开采火山灰。

english: There is new information available from the Mining Tutor south of Lumbridge.
translation: 仑桥镇以南的采矿导师那里有新的讯息。

english: You can now mine Coal. Members can mine Pure Rune Essence and size-3 stars, and access the Motherlode mine.
translation: 你现在可以开采煤。会员可以开采纯净符文精华和3级星星，并进入母岩矿坑。

english: You can now mine with adamant pickaxes.
translation: 你现在可以使用精金镐开采。

english: Members can now mine Sandstone.
translation: 会员现在可以开采砂岩。

english: Members can now mine Dense Essence.
translation: 会员现在可以开采浓缩精华。

english: You can now mine Gold. Members can mine Gem rocks and size-4 stars.

english: You can now mine with rune pickaxes and Gilded pickaxes. Members can mine Calcified deposits in Cam Torum.

english: You can now mine Mithril. Members can now equip Superior mining gloves.

english: You can now enter the world famous Mining Guild. Members can now mine Daeyalt Essence and size-6 stars.

english: Members can now mine with dragon pickaxes and infernal pickaxes.

english: You can now mine Adamantite. Members can now mine soft clay and size-7 stars, and equip Expert mining gloves.

english: Members can now mine with Crystal Pickaxes.

english: Members can now mine Te Salt, Efh Salt, Urt Salt, and Basalt.

english: Members can now mine Ancient essence.
translation: 会员现在可以开采古代精华。

english: Members can now mine size-8 stars.
translation: 会员现在可以开采8级星星。

english: You can now mine Runite.
translation: 你现在可以开采符文。

english: Members can now mine size-9 stars.
translation: 会员现在可以开采9级星星。

english: Members can now mine Amethyst.
translation: 会员现在可以开采紫水晶。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master miner. Why not visit Gadrin at the entrance to the Mining Guild? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Mining skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是采矿大师。为何不去采矿公会入口拜访加德林？他有唯有真正的采矿技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Prayer allows you to access different prayers, available from the Prayer side panel. Each prayer offers a different powerful benefit.
translation: 祈祷技能让你可以使用不同的祈祷，可从祈祷面板启用。每个祈祷提供不同的强大增益效果。

english: Using prayers will drain your prayer points over time. Once you run out of prayer points, you will be unable to use any prayers. You can restore your prayer points by praying at an altar.
translation: 启用祈祷会随时间消耗祈祷值。祈祷值耗尽后，你将无法使用任何祈祷。你可以通过在祭坛祷告来恢复祈祷值。

english: Some pieces of equipment will grant you a Prayer bonus, which will reduce the rate at which your prayer points are drained.
translation: 某些装备会提供祈祷加成，这将降低祈祷值消耗速度。

english: The most common way to increase your Prayer level is to offer the remains of the enemies you kill. Burying their bones and scattering their ashes will award you Prayer experience.
translation: 提高祈祷等级最常见的方式是供奉被击杀敌人的遗骨。埋葬骨头或撒播骨灰可获得祈祷经验值。

english: Members can now use the Prayer Piety, and can use Superior dragon bones, Arcane & Spectral spirit shields, Dragonbone & Bonecrusher necklaces and Soul capes!

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Prayer. Why not visit Brother Jered, upstairs at the Monastery? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Prayer skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是祈祷大师。为何不去修道院楼上拜访杰瑞德兄弟？他有唯有真正的祈祷技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Your Ranged level determines how accurate you are with ranged weapons, as well as how much damage they do. A higher Ranged level will result in more hits that do more damage.
translation: 远程等级决定你使用远程武器的精准度以及造成的伤害量。更高的远程等级将提高命中率并增加伤害。

english: Most ranged weapons will need a specific kind of ammunition to go with them; for instance, bows will need arrows and crossbows will need bolts.
translation: 大多数远程武器需要特定类型的弹药。例如弓需要箭，弩需要弩箭。

english: As your Ranged level increases, you will also get access to more powerful weapons and ammunition. Typically, each ranged weapon can only handle ammo up to a certain level; for instance, an oak bow can only fire bronze, iron or steel arrows, but not mithril.
translation: 随着你的远程等级提高，你还将解锁更强大的武器和弹药。通常，每种远程武器只能使用特定等级及以下的弹药。例如橡木弓只能发射青铜、铁或钢箭，但不能发射秘银箭。

english: You can now wield oak bows and members can wield steel throwing weapons.
translation: 你现在可以使用橡木弓，会员可以使用钢制投掷武器。

english: Members can now wield black throwing weapons.
translation: 会员现在可以使用黑铁投掷武器。

english: Members can now wield blurite crossbows and blurite crossbow bolts.
translation: 会员现在可以使用蓝铁弩和蓝铁弩箭。

english: You can now wield willow bows and wear studded armour and coifs, and members can wield mithril throwing weapons.
translation: 你现在可以使用柳木弓并穿戴铆钉盔甲和头巾，会员可以使用秘银投掷武器。

english: Members can now wear frog-leather armour.
translation: 会员现在可以装备蛙皮甲。

english: Members can now wield iron crossbows and iron crossbow bolts.
translation: 会员现在可以使用铁弩和铁弩箭。

english: Members can now wield bone crossbows.
translation: 会员现在可以使用骨弩。

english: There is new information available from the Ranged Combat Tutor in Lumbridge.
translation: 仑桥镇的远程战斗导师那里有新的讯息。

english: You can now wield maple bows. Members can use adamant throwing weapons, the ogre composite bow and snakeskin armour.

english: Members can now wield steel crossbows and steel crossbow bolts.

translation: 会员可以使用秘银抓钩穿越仑河往返阿尔卡里德城。

translation: 会员可以使用秘银抓钩离开凯瑟比镇附近的水上方尖碑岛。

english: You can now wear green dragonhide armour. Members can wield yew bows, rune throwing weapons and can wear ranger boots and the Robin Hood hat.
translation: 你现在可以装备绿龙皮盔甲。会员可以使用紫杉弓、符文投掷武器并可以穿戴射手靴和罗宾汉帽。

english: Members can now wield Void Knight equipment!
translation: 会员现在可以装备虚空骑士装备！

english: Members can now wield chinchompas.
translation: 会员现在可以使用炸弹鼠。

translation: 会员现在可以使用魔法弓、狩猎弩、紫水晶飞镖并可以穿戴蓝龙皮盔甲。

english: Members can now wield red chinchompas.

translation: 会员现在可以装备红龙皮盔甲，使用黑暗弓、克劳的弓、龙爪飞镖、龙金飞刀和黑曜石爪。

english: Members can now wield runite crossbows, wield runite crossbow bolts and use dragon thrownaxes.'
translation: 会员现在可以使用符文弩、符文弩箭和龙金投斧。

english: Members can now attempt grapple encounters within The Hallowed Sepulchre.
translation: 会员现在可以尝试神圣墓穴内的抓钩捷径。

english: Members can now wield black chinchompas, the 3rd age bow and light ballistae, and wear 3rd age range armour.
translation: 会员现在可以使用黑色炸弹鼠、第三纪元弓和轻型弩炮，并穿戴第三纪元射手盔甲。

english: Members can now equip elf crystal, the Dragon Hunter Crossbow, the Webweaver bow and Dragonfire wards, wear black dragonhide armour, wear Hueycoatl hide armour  and gain access to the Armadyl area in the God Wars Dungeon.
translation: 会员现在可以装备精灵水晶、猎龙弩、织网弓和龙火护符，穿戴黑龙皮盔甲和休伊科特尔皮盔甲并进入神战地牢的阿玛杜尔区域。

english: Members can now wield toxic blowpipes, the Tonalztics of Ralos, heavy ballistae, the Eclipse Atlatl and equip Eclipse Armour and Dizana's Quiver!
translation: 会员现在可以装备有毒的吹箭筒、拉洛斯音律、重型弩炮、月蚀投矛器并装备月蚀盔甲和迪扎纳的箭袋！

english: Members can now wield scorching bows!.
translation: 会员现在可以装备灼热弓！

english: Members can now wield Zaryte crossbows and Venator bows, and wear Masori armour.
translation: 会员现在可以装备扎里特弩和维纳托弓，并穿戴马索里盔甲。

english: Members can now wield Zaryte crossbows, Venator bows and the Bow of Faerdhinen, and wear Masori armour.
translation: 会员现在可以使用扎里特弩、维纳托弓和法尔迪宁之弓，并穿戴马索里盔甲。

english: Members can now wield the Twisted bow.
translation: 会员现在可以装备扭曲弓。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Ranged. Why not visit Aaron at the Ranging Guild? He has something special only available to true masters of the Ranged skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是射手大师。为何不去射手公会拜访亚伦？他有唯有真正的射手技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Runecraft is the skill that allows you to convert essences into runes, which you can use to cast spells.
translation: 符石制作是让你将精华转化为符石的技能，你可以使用这些符石来施放法术。

english: To create runes, you'll first need some essence and a talisman of the rune you want to make. You can use the talisman to both locate and access the runic altar, which is where the runes are crafted.
translation: 要制作符石，你首先需要一些精华和对应符石的护符。你可以使用护符来定位并进入符文祭坛，符石就是在那里制作的。

english: Higher Runecraft levels will allow you to craft more kinds of runes. At higher levels, you'll also be able to make multiple runes per essence.
translation: 更高的符石制作等级将让你可以制作更多种类的符石。随着等级的提升，你还能从每块精华中制作出多个符石。

english: You can now craft Mind Runes.
translation: 你现在可以制作心灵符石。

english: You can now craft Water Runes.
translation: 你现在可以制作水符石。

english: Members can now craft Mist Runes from Pure Rune Essence.
translation: 会员现在可以用纯净符文精华制作迷雾符石。

english: You can now craft Earth Runes.
translation: 你现在可以制作大地符石。

translation: 会员现在可以用纯净符文精华制作灰尘符石。

translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得2个风符石。

translation: 会员现在可以用纯净符文精华制作泥符石。

translation: 你现在可以制作火符石，现在每个精华可以获得2个心灵符石。

translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得2个躯体符石，会员现在可以用自然符石注魔裂皮头盔。

translation: 会员现在可以用纯净符文精华制作律法符石。

translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得4个水符石。

english: Members will now receive 2 Cosmic Runes from each Pure Rune Essence
translation: 会员现在每个纯净符文精华可以获得2个宇宙符石

translation: 会员现在可以注魔永恒靴、天马靴和原始靴！

translation: 会员现在可以用纯净符文精华制作死亡符石。

translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得7个风符石，会员每个精华可以获得2个阳火符文。

translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得6个心灵符石和3个火符石。

translation: 会员现在每个纯净符文精华可以获得2个混沌符石

translation: 会员：你现在可以使用巨型精华袋袋来携带额外的精华。

translation: 会员现在可以用纯净符文精华或黑暗精华制作血符石，你现在每个精华可以获得8个风符石。会员还可以用血符石注魔裂皮靴和手套。

translation: 会员现在可以用血符石注魔裂皮头盔。

translation: 会员现在可以用血符石注魔裂皮甲和裂皮腿。

translation: 会员现在每个纯净符文精华可以获得2个星界符石

translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得7个心灵符石。

translation: 56级制作的会员现在可以制作特大精华袋来携带更多精华。

translation: 你现在每个精华可以获得9个风符石。

translation: 会员现在可以用黑暗精华制作灵魂符石。

translation: 会员现在每个纯净符文精华可以获得2个自然符石

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Runecrafting. Why not visit Aubury, who runs the rune shop in Varrock, where you can buy something special that is only available to true masters of the
translation: 恭喜！你现在是符石制作大师。为何不去拜访奥伯里，他在维洛克城经营符文店，在那里你可以购买只有真正的符石制作

english: Runecrafting skill!
translation: 技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: You must complete the Pandemonium quest to unlock the Sailing skill.
translation: 你必须完成潘德莫尼姆任务才能解锁航海技能。

english: Sailing gives you the ability to captain a boat and sail the seas of Gielinor. Out at sea, you'll find all kinds of things to do. You can salvage shipwrecks for sunken treasure, test yourself in Barracuda Trials, or explore uncharted islands, just to name a few.
translation: 航海技能让你能够驾驶船只航行于基利诺尔的海洋。在海上你会发现各种各样的事情可做。你可以打捞沉船寻找沉没的宝藏，在梭鱼试炼中测试自己，或探索未知岛屿等等。

english: As your Sailing level increases, you'll be able to own more boats, build better facilities on your boats, hire more crewmates, dock at more locations, and much more!
translation: 随着你的航海等级提高，你将能够拥有更多船只，在船上建造更好的设施，雇佣更多船员，在更多地点停靠等等！

english: You can now dock your boat at Land's End and Hosidius.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在兰兹角村和霍西迪乌斯城。

english: You can now accept up to two port tasks at the same time.
translation: 你现在最多可以同时接受两个港口任务。

english: You can now dock your boat at Musa Point.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在穆萨角。

english: You can now chart drink crates (after completing Prying Times).
translation: 你现在可以绘制饮料箱海图 (完成撬开宝箱后)。

english: You can now captain a skiff, own two different boats, dock your boat at Port Piscarillius, salvage from small shipwrecks and build a bronze salvaging hook.
translation: 你现在可以驾驶小艇和拥有两艘不同的船，以及将船停靠在皮斯卡里琉斯港，并从小型沉船中打捞并建造青铜打捞钩。

english: You can now build a range (with 6 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造炉灶 (需要6级建筑)。

english: You can now build an iron helm (with 14 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造铁制头盔 (需要14级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Rimmington and build an oak cargo hold (with 11 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在里明顿村并建造橡木货舱 (需要11级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Catherby and build an oak hull (with 8 Construction.)
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在凯瑟比镇并建造橡木船体 (需要8级建筑。)

english: You can now build an iron salvaging hook (with 9 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造铁制打捞钩 (需要9级建筑)。

english: You can now chart sea currents (after completing Current Affairs) and build an iron keel (with 17 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以绘制海流海图 (完成时事后) 并建造铁制龙骨 (需要17级建筑)。

english: You can now build an oak mast and linen sails (with 11 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造橡木桅杆和亚麻帆 (需要11级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Brimhaven and build flags and trims (with 20 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在布尔哈文镇并建造旗帜和装饰 (需要20级建筑)。

english: You can now salvage from fisherman's shipwrecks.
translation: 你现在可以从渔夫沉船中打捞。

english: You can now build a steel salvaging hook (with 18 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造钢制打捞钩 (需要18级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Ardougne, accept up to three port tasks at the same time and build a bronze cannon (with 21 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在阿多尼城，最多同时接受三个港口任务并建造青铜大炮 (需要21级建筑)。

english: You can now build a teak cargo hold (with 21 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造柚木货舱 (需要21级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Port Khazard and take on the Tempor Tantrum Barracuda Trial in the Storm Tempor.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在卡扎德港并在风暴海域中接受大海之怒梭鱼试炼。

english: You can now build a teak hull (with 23 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造柚木船体 (需要23级建筑)。

english: You can now build a Keg (with 25 Construction).

english: You can now dock your boat at Witchaven.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在海巫港。

english: You can now salvage from Barracuda shipwrecks and build an iron cannon (with 28 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以从梭鱼沉船中打捞并建造铁制大炮 (需要28级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Entrana and build a teak mast and canvas sail (with 26 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在恩特纳岛并建造柚木桅杆和帆布帆 (需要26级建筑)。

english: You can now build an anchor (with 26 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造锚 (需要26级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Civitas illa Fortis (after completing Children of the Sun), chart sea depths (after completing Recipe for Disaster - Freeing Pirate Pete) and build a steel helm (with 30 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在福蒂斯城 (完成太阳之子后)，绘制海洋深度海图 (完成灾难食谱 - 解救海盗皮特后 )并建造钢制头盔 (需要30级建筑)。

english: You can now build a steel keel (with 32 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造钢制龙骨 (需要32级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Corsair Cove (after completing The corsair Curse) and Dognose Island, assign one crewmate to duties on your boat, recruit Jobless Jim from Port Sarim and build an innoculation station (with 37 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在海盗湾 (完成海盗诅咒后) 和多格诺斯岛，分配一名船员在船上工作，从沙林港招募无业吉姆并建造净化站 (需要37级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Cairn Isle and Chinchompa Island and build a salvaging station (with 34 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在凯恩岛和炸弹鼠岛并建造打捞站 (需要34级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Sunset Coast (after completing Children of the Sun) and build a mithril salvaging hook (with 30 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在日落海岸 (完成太阳之子后) 并建造秘银打捞钩 (需要30级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at both the Summer Shore and the Little Pearl (after completing Troubled Tortugans).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在夏日海岸和小珍珠岛 (完成困扰的海龟人后)。

translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在阿尔达林岛 (完成太阳之子后)和瓦特拉科斯岛并建造红木货舱 (需要41级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Onyx Crest and build a steel cannon (with 39 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在玛瑙山脊岛并建造钢制大炮 (需要39级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Ruins of Unkah and build a mahogany hull (with 41 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在昂卡遗址并建造红木船体 (需要41级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Shimmering Atoll.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在闪烁环礁。

english: You can now captain a sloop, own three different boats, dock at the Void Knights' Outpost and Port Roberts and recruit Captain Siad from the Desert Mining Camp (after completing The Tourist Trap).
translation: 你现在可以驾驶单桅帆船和拥有三艘不同的船，以及停靠在虚空骑士前哨站和罗伯特港并从沙漠采矿营招募西亚德船长 (完成旅游陷阱后)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Anglers' Retreat.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在垂钓者隐居地。

translation: 你现在可以建造红木桅杆和帆布帆 (需要45级建筑)。

english: You can now salvage from large shipwrecks and build a wind catcher (with 47 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以从大型沉船中打捞并建造捕风器 (需要47级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Minotaurs' Rest and build a mithril keel (with 50 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在牛头怪安息地并建造秘银龙骨 (需要50级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Isle of Souls, take on the Jubbly Jive Barracuda Trial in Backwater, assign two crewmates to duties on your boat, recruit Adventurer Ada from the Pandemonium, build a mithril helm (with 47 Construction) and build a teleport focus (with 49 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在灵魂岛、在回水湾接受胖食人鸟摇摆梭鱼试炼、分配两名船员在船上工作、从潘德莫尼姆岛招募冒险者阿达、建造秘银头盔 (需要47级建筑)和建造传送核心 (需要49级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Isle of Bones, accept up to four port tasks at the same time and build a rope trawling net (with 45 Construction) and a chum station (with 45 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在白骨岛，以及最多同时接受四个港口任务并建造绳索拖网 (需要45级建筑)和诱饵台 (需要45级建筑)。

english: You can now chart weather patterns and build a mithril cannon (with 50 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以绘制天气模式海图并建造秘银大炮 (需要50级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Laguna Aurorae.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在极光泻湖。

english: You can now build an adamant salvaging hook (with 52 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造精金打捞钩 (需要52级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Charred Island, recruit Cabin Boy Jenkins from Crandor (after completing Dragon Slayer I) and build a camphor cargo hold (with 53 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在焦黑岛，以及从克兰多岛招募船舱侍应詹金斯 (完成屠龙者 I 后) 并建造樟木货舱 (需要53级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Tear of the Soul.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在灵魂之泪。

english: You can now dock your boat at Rellekka (after completing The Fremennik Trials).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在雷勒卡城 (完成费明尼克试炼后)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Wintumber Island.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在冬木岛。

english: You can now dock your boat at the Crown Jewel and salvage from pirate shipwrecks.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在皇冠宝石并从海盗沉船中打捞。

english: You can now dock your boat at Etceteria (after completing Royal Trouble) and recruit Oarswoman Olga from Burgh de Rott (after completing In Aid of the Myreque).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在埃西特利亚岛 (完成皇家麻烦后)并从伯格德罗特镇招募女桨手奥尔加 (完成援助迈雷克后)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Port Tyras (after completing Regicide) and Lledrith Island and build an adamant keel (with 62 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在提拉斯港 (完成弑君后)和莱德里思岛并建造精金龙骨 (需要62级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Deepfin Point and build a camphor hull (with 59 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在深鳍岬并建造樟木船体 (需要59级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at both Jatizso and Neitiznot (after completing The Fremennik Isles), build a camphor mast and canvas sails (with 60 Construction), build a linen trawling net (with 61 Construction) and build an advanced chum station (with 61 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在加提兹索岛和奈提兹诺镇 (完成费明尼克群岛后)，以及建造樟木桅杆和帆布帆 (需要60级建筑)、亚麻拖网 (需要61级建筑)和高级诱饵台 (需要61级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Rainbow's End and build an adamant cannon (with 61 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在彩虹尽头并建造精金大炮 (需要61级建筑)。

english: You can now dock at Prifddinas (after completing Song of the Elves), assign three crewmates to duties on your boat, recruit Jittery Jim from Port Khazard and build a fathom stone (with 62 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在普里夫迪纳斯城 (完成精灵之歌后)、分配三名船员在船上工作、从卡扎德港招募紧张吉姆和建造测深石 (需要62级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Sunbleak Island, take on the Gwenith Glide Barracuda Trial in Port Gwenith (after completing Regicide) and build an adamant helm (with 59 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在日晒岛，以及在格温尼斯港接受格温尼斯滑翔梭鱼试炼 (完成弑君后)并建造精金头盔 (需要59级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Ynysdail, salvage from mercenary shipwrecks and build a Crystal extractor (with 67 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在伊尼斯代尔，从雇佣兵沉船中打捞并建造水晶提取器 (需要67级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Waterbirth Island (after completing The Fremennik Trials) and build a rune salvaging hook (with 66 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在水诞岛 (完成费明尼克试炼后) 并建造符文打捞钩 (需要66级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Piscatoris (after completing Swan Song) and build a greater teleport focus (with 69 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在皮斯卡托里斯 (完成天鹅之歌后) 并建造强效传送核心 (需要69级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Lunar Isle (after completing Lunar Diplomacy) and Buccaneers' Haven.
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在月亮岛 (完成月亮外交后) 和海盗避风港。

english: You can now own four different boats and build an eternal brazier (with 72 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以拥有四艘不同的船并建造永恒火盆 (需要72级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Drumstick Isle, build a gale catcher (with 70 Construction) and build a hemp trawling net (with 70 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在鸡腿岛，以及建造狂风收集器 (需要70级建筑)和大麻拖网 (需要70级建筑)。

english: You can now dock at Weiss (after completing Making Friends with My Arm), salvage from Fremennik shipwrecks, recruit Bosun Zarah from Etceteria (after completing Royal Trouble), build a rune cannon (with 76 Construction) and build an ironwood cargo hold (with 77 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在魏斯聚落 (完成与''我的手臂''交朋友后)、从费明尼克沉船中打捞、从埃西特利亚岛招募水手长扎拉 (完成皇家麻烦后)、建造符文大炮 (需要76级建筑)和铁木货舱 (需要77级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Brittle Isle and build an ironwood hull (with 75 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在脆裂岛并建造铁木船体 (需要75级建筑)。

english: You can now build a chum spreader (with 74 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造鱼饵投放机 (需要74级建筑)。

english: You can now build an ironwood mast and cotton sails (with 77 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造铁木桅杆和棉帆 (需要77级建筑)。

english: You can now accept up to five port tasks at the same time and build a cotton trawling net (with 73 Construction).
translation: 你现在最多可以同时接受五个港口任务并建造棉拖网 (需要73级建筑)。

english: You can now assign four crewmates to duties on your boat, recruit Jolly Jim from Brimhaven and build a rune keel (with 78 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以分配四名船员在船上工作，以及从布尔哈文镇招募快乐吉姆并建造符文龙骨 (需要78级建筑)。

english: You can now build a dragon salvaging hook (with 78 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造龙金打捞钩 (需要78级建筑)。

english: You can now dock your boat at Grimstone, salvage from merchant shipwrecks and build a rune helm (with 81 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以将船停靠在阴森石，从商人沉船中打捞并建造符文头盔 (需要81级建筑)。

english: You can now build a rosewood cargo hold (with 84 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造玫瑰木货舱 (需要84级建筑)。

english: You can now recruit Spotter Virginia from the Ruins of Unkah (after subduing Tempoross 100 times).
translation: 你现在可以从昂卡遗址招募瞭望员弗吉尼亚 (击败海灵100次后)。

english: You can now own five different boats and build a fathom pearl (with 83 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以拥有五艘不同的船并建造测深珍珠 (需要83级建筑)。

english: You can now build a dragon cannon (with 84 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造龙金大炮 (需要84级建筑)。

english: You can now build a rosewood hull (with 84 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造玫瑰木船体 (需要84级建筑)。

english: You can now build a rosewood mast and cotton sails (with 85 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造玫瑰木桅杆和棉帆 (需要85级建筑)。

english: You can now assign five crewmates to duties on your boat and recruit Sailor Jakob from Catherby.
translation: 你现在可以分配五名船员在船上工作并从凯瑟比镇招募水手雅各布。

english: You can now build a dragon helm (with 86 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造龙金头盔 (需要86级建筑)。

english: You can now build a dragon keel (with 87 Construction).
translation: 你现在可以建造龙金龙骨 (需要87级建筑)。

english: Congratulations! You are now a master of Sailing. Why not visit Brass Hand Harry on the Pandemonium? He has something special that is only available to true masters of the Sailing skill!
translation: 恭喜！你现在是航海大师。为何不去潘德莫尼姆岛拜访铜手哈里？他有唯有真正的航海技能大师才能获得的特别物品！

english: Slayer is a skill that lets you fight increasingly dangerous and lucrative monsters. Some monsters can only be fought if you have a high enough Slayer level.
translation: 杀戮是一项让你与越来越危险且奖励更丰厚的怪物战斗的技能。有些怪物只有达到足够的杀戮等级才能击杀。

english: To get started with Slayer, you'll first need a Slayer task, which can be obtained from a Slayer Master. You can then kill the assigned target to get Slayer experience.
translation: 要开始训练杀戮技能，你首先需要从杀戮大师获得杀戮任务，然后击杀指定目标来获得杀戮经验。

english: Once you've completed five tasks, you can start earning reward points, which can be used to skip or block tasks you don't want, or purchase various items and benefits like extended tasks.
translation: 完成五个任务后，你就可以开始赚取奖励点数。这些点数可用于跳过或屏蔽你不想要的任务，或购买各种物品和特权，例如增加任务的目标数量。

english: Smithing lets you convert raw ores into useful metals, then use those metals to make your own weapons and armour.
translation: 锻造技能让你可以将矿石转化为金属锭，然后使用这些金属锭制作你自己的武器和盔甲。

english: To smelt ores, simply take the mix of ores you need to any furnace and you'll be able to convert them into bars.
translation: 要冶炼矿石，只需将所需矿石带到任何熔炉，你就可以将它们转化为金属锭。

english: Once you have your bars, grab a hammer and take them to an anvil. Bigger items will need more bars to make.
translation: 准备好金属锭后，带上锤子前往铁砧即可制作。制作大型物品需要消耗更多的金属锭。

english: As you advance your Smithing level, you'll be able to make more gear out of higher quality metals.
translation: 随着你提升锻造等级，你将能够用更高质量的金属制作更多装备。

english: You can now make Bronze Maces.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜钉锤。

english: You can now make Bronze Medium Helms and members can make Bronze Crossbow Bolts.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜中盔，会员可以制作青铜弩箭。

translation: 你现在可以制作青铜弯刀，会员可以制作青铜箭头、青铜长矛和青铜刺矛。

english: You can now make Bronze Long Swords. Members can make Bronze Crossbow Limbs and Bronze Javelin Heads and convert Steel Felling Axes.
translation: 你现在可以制作青铜长剑。会员可以制作青铜弩臂、青铜标枪标头和钢制伐木斧。

translation: 你现在可以制作青铜方盾。

english: You can now make Bronze Battle Axes.

translation: 你现在可以制作精金鸢盾，会员可以制作赛尔多尔之刃和法尔迪宁之弓。

translation: 你现在可以制作精金腿甲、精金裙甲和符文斧。

translation: 你现在可以制作符文钉锤，会员可以制作谢兹恩靴 (5)。

translation: 你现在可以制作精金胸甲和符文中盔，会员可以制作符文弩箭。

translation: 你现在可以制作符文短剑。会员可以制作符文镖尖、符文钉和谢兹恩头盔 (5)。
